name: Cheese Squares
recipeIngredient: 2 Jars Old English Cheese, Spread; 5oz each
4 ounces Can chopped green chilies, drained
2 Loaves thin-sliced bread, crust removed, each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter, cheese spread, and egg until smooth.
2. Stir in the chopped green chilies, salsa, and shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Spread about 1 tablespoon of the mixture on each slice of one loaf of bread.
4. Top with the remaining bread slices, spreading more cheese mixture evenly.
5. Cut each sandwich into 4 squares and place them on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until bubbly and lightly browned.
7. To freeze: Place the cut sandwiches in a single layer on a baking sheet. Freeze for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the baking sheet and store in an airtight container in the freezer until ready to bake.
9. To bake frozen squares, place them on a greased baking sheet. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until bubbly and browned.
